subcodes.first_line: Although at the commencement of every epistle it is incumbent, nay obligatory, upon every soul to make mention of the One Friend, the Peerless Beloved, and the Ultimate Goal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگرچه اول هر نامه بر هر نفسی لازم بل واجب ذکر دوست یکتا و محبوب یکتا و مقصود
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for forgiveness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @chastisement and requital
